{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Twin Star
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Jai Chen]]'s robe had the [[Twin Star]] logo.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
